triage_rows.direction: keep_the_topmost supervising process on a steady supervision cadence when contract_action remains keep_steady_supervision
tighten_the_topmost supervising cadence when contract_action rotates into tighten_supervision_loop or elevate_supervision_only
interrupt_and reopen the requested target immediately when contract_action rotates into interrupt_supervision_loop_and_reopen_target

interpretation: This is the topmost instruction row for the internal hot-news runtime stack.
A supervising process can stop here and run the next cycle directly from the contract unless it needs deeper diagnostics.
